des: Create a .mcp_server_settings.json file in the data directory. You can select the MCP services listed below, or add new MCP services yourself.
We will continue to test and add usable MCP services. Everyone is welcome to contribute.
Remember to remove the comment lines. The 'des' attribute is for illustrative purposes only and will not be parsed.
The 'des' and 'link' attributes are only for illustrating the installation method and for viewing the original link; they are not required.
Currently, three transmission modes are supported: stdio (standard input/output), sse (Server-Sent Events), and streamable-http (streaming HTTP).

streamable-http-mcp-server.des: Using the Streamable HTTP transport mode, suitable for production-level web deployments
